title: Pakistan proposes 2-week Iran ceasefire ahead of Trump deadline
snippet: Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif called on Trump and Iran to agree to 2-week ceasefire. Asked Iran to open Hormuz as goodwill gesture. All warring parties to observe ceasefire everywhere for 2 weeks. Pakistan has been primary mediator over last several weeks.
tag_reason: 파키스탄 중재 제안의 구체적 내용을 담은 신규 보도
